examples: Oil comes from Trinidad, Aruba and Curacao.
In Curacao, the well-known liquor of that name is made from the thick outer skin of a native orange.
Mr Wiels was well known as a fervent supporter of cutting Curacao's ties with the Netherlands.
Curacao and Sint Maarten said that they were contributing a disproportionately large amount to the government.
The Curacao government said the Netherlands had offered to help with the investigation into Mr Wiels's murder.
